title: Urticaria: A comprehensive review: Epidemiology, diagnosis, and work-up.
author_string: Antia, Camila, Baquerizo, Katherine, Korman, Abraham, Bernstein, Jonathan A, Alikhan, Ali
journal_full: Journal of the American Academy of Dermatology
abstract: Urticaria is a common clinical condition presenting with wheals (hives), angioedema, or both. Urticaria has a complex pathogenesis, along with a high disease burden, a significant impact on quality of life, and high health care costs. The first article in this continuing medical education series covers the definition, classification, epidemiology, diagnosis, and work-up of urticaria, taking into account the recent literature and the best available evidence.
